meaning: adj.閲庡吔娲剧殑,閲庡吔娲鹃鏍肩殑
examples: The burglar seems to be an equal opportunity collector, having snatched pieces spanning Impressionist, Fauvist, and Cubist movements.
Meanwhile, "Silver Ball" (1930) by Arthur Dove presents circular and jagged shapes of dour color outlined with black Fauvist-style brushstrokes.
